tiers.name: Public Sandbox
tiers.description: Non-commercial evaluation only. Uses X-API-Key: mvr-demo-key-2026 with full_advisory/client_safe limits, low caps, and no production rights.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.description: Developer testing and light agent integration.

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.description: Higher-volume integrations and broader route access.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.description: Tenant-scoped deployment, private limits, governance support, and enterprise integrations.
